title: Bedrock Redux
description: A minecraft mod that ports some features from Bedrock edition to Java edition.
body:
Do you envy the features of Bedrock Edition? Do you feel like playing Java Edition with those features? Try this mod!

If you haven't played Minecraft Bedrock Edition, let me introduce those features:

## Generations of Water Creatures

Fishes, squids and other water creatures can now spawn in bubble column blocks and flowing water blocks, and the Y-axis coordinate is not limited below 64.

## Bartering

When breaking a block guarded by piglins (such as gold block, nether gold ore), piglins admiring gold ingot will immediately toss the result item and finish the barter, which makes it possible for players to make bartering farm and gain a lot loots in a short period of time from piglins.

## Trident Killer

In Bedrock Edition, thrown tridents will cause damage when they are pushed by pistons, while they won't in Java Edition. But now this feature is ported to Java Edition, so you can make a trident killer with this mod.
